_meta.audit_finding_summary: Plan §11 cited 4 demo screens (333/217/091/412) by ID. Audit found only 333 matches its description. 217/091/412 fail (217 is bare iPhone, 091 is icon_def, 412 doesn't exist). Plan also assumed semantic token names like color.action.primary; corpus had EMPTY tokens table pre-cluster and auto-clustering produces role+lightness names like color.surface.primary / color.border.tertiary. Plan §11 needs revision against corpus reality. This audit selects 4 screens that match each demo INTENT using shapes that actually exist.

rejected_picks_from_plan_v3.screen_217: FAIL — bare 'iPhone 13 Pro Max - 82'; no cart/total/banner/success matches in node names or text content.
rejected_picks_from_plan_v3.screen_091: FAIL — screen_type='icon_def', name='icon/pixel', 20x20 (an icon definition, not an app screen).
rejected_picks_from_plan_v3.screen_412: FAIL — does not exist (max screen id = 338).
rejected_picks_from_plan_v3.color.action.primary_token: DOES NOT EXIST as a named token. Cluster auto-names tokens by role+lightness; closest match is color.surface.* / color.border.tertiary (#047AFF ≈ iOS system blue).
rejected_picks_from_plan_v3.color.feedback.success_token: DOES NOT EXIST. No 'feedback' or 'success' or green-by-name token in the auto-clustered namespace.
rejected_picks_from_plan_v3.list-row/destructive_component: DOES NOT EXIST in component_key_registry. No 'list_row' canonical_type instances anywhere in corpus (only list_item, n=179).
rejected_picks_from_plan_v3.chip_canonical_type: ZERO instances corpus-wide. Plan's Demo C 'chip' shape cannot be sourced from this DB.
rejected_picks_from_plan_v3.implication: Demo intents (DS-correct edit / token propagation / adversarial verifier / compose with real components) are still achievable, but with different anchor shapes than the plan author hand-picked. Picks below.

demo_a_ds_correct_edit.intent: Agent edits inside the design system, not next to it.
demo_a_ds_correct_edit.demo_brief_proposed: Increase the radius on the primary CTA in this screen to 12.
demo_a_ds_correct_edit.expected_agent_output: emit_set_edit(@btn, {cornerRadius: token_ref('radius.12')}) — radius.12 token exists with value 12, exact match.
demo_a_ds_correct_edit.kill_shot: Panel shows componentKey 689e60bd... unchanged; cornerRadius bound to radius.12; padding/spacing tokens preserved across edit.

demo_b_token_propagation.intent: Change the token, the agent's output changes. No re-prompt.
demo_b_token_propagation.screen_choice_rationale: Stay on screen 333 (real iPad app screen) for visual coherence. Subagent suggested screen 334 (3881x2622 'Frame 429') for max binding density (1039 nodes), but 334 is a design canvas not an app_screen — would undermine demo credibility.

alternate_token_options.name: color.border.tertiary
alternate_token_options.note: iOS system blue accent — would be a cleaner accent demo than black

demo_b_token_propagation.demo_brief_proposed: Add a divider line below the primary content area, using the screen's primary border color.
demo_b_token_propagation.expected_agent_output: emit_append(@area, divider_frame_with_stroke_bound_to_color.border.tertiary). Operator opens Figma Variables, edits color.border.tertiary from #047AFF to (e.g.) #00CC66. Divider repaints + the 21 other bindings on this screen also flip color.
demo_b_token_propagation.kill_shot: Figma Variables panel and agent panel side-by-side; operator changes swatch and within one frame both update with no CLI call.

demo_c_adversarial_verifier.intent: An LLM constrained by a type system. Agent emits a literal close to a real token; verifier rejects + suggests the token.
demo_c_adversarial_verifier.demo_brief_proposed: Match the white status-icon color used elsewhere in the app for this Battery Icon.
demo_c_adversarial_verifier.kill_shot: Visible verifier rejection line in the transcript next to the corrected canvas.

demo_d_compose_with_real_components.intent: New instance, right variant axis, slots filled — from one sentence.
demo_d_compose_with_real_components.screen_choice_rationale: Originally picked 243 (same shape — 24 large/12 small/4 solid translucent buttons + 'button/toolbar' container with 7 children). Moved to 311 because 243 is in the iPad-translucent-cluster drift set per feedback_ipad_component_frame_inlining.md (0.96 round-trip parity). Demo D's append op is unaffected by missing_child class drift, but using a clean screen removes the yellow flag entirely. Screen 311 has identical inventory (24 large + 12 small + 4 solid + 6 toolbars) and is not in any known drift set.

target_container.name: button/toolbar
target_container.rationale: VERTICAL auto-layout container holding 8 large translucent button INSTANCEs. Appending a 9th INSTANCE with size=small flips the size axis on a single child — visually obvious because the new button is shorter than its siblings.

variant_axis_selection.note: These are the actual variant properties recorded in component_variants for this component family. Plan v3 cited {size:lg, leading:icon, trailing:chevron} — those slot/leading axes are NOT modeled in this corpus. We use the concrete corpus axes.

demo_d_compose_with_real_components.demo_brief_proposed: Add a small translucent button to the toolbar at the right side of the screen.
demo_d_compose_with_real_components.kill_shot: Variant chips in the panel light up matching the rendered INSTANCE; componentKey 74a7396e… matches CKR; new button visibly shorter than the 8 large-variant siblings.

drift_status.note: Screen 311 is NOT in any known drift set. Original pick (243) WAS — moved to 311 to keep Demo D's anchor on a clean screen.

global_constraints.no_chip_in_corpus: Demo C as plan-v3 wrote it (chip-typed node) cannot run. Battery Icon is a structurally analogous small-isolated-element substitute.
global_constraints.no_destructive_component: Demo D as plan-v3 wrote it (list-row/destructive) cannot run. button/small/translucent is a structurally analogous small-button-with-variant-axis substitute.
global_constraints.no_semantic_screen_names: All 204 app_screens are bare device labels. Demos must reference IDs, not names.
global_constraints.tokens_are_role_indexed: Auto-cluster names tokens color.<role>.<lightness-rank> not color.<intent>.<state>. Demo briefs must use role-named tokens (color.border.primary etc.) not intent-named (color.action.primary etc.).
